channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay Promises Strict Action After 10-Year-Old Girl is Sexually Assaulted and Murdered in Coimbatore
item.description: In a shocking incident that has caused widespread anger in Tamil Nadu, a 10-year-old girl was sexually assaulted and murdered in Coimbatore on 21st May 2026. The girl went missing while playing outsid...

item.title: Kirinyaga Man Recounts Trauma After Fighting in Russian Military During Ukraine War
item.description: Dishon Maina, a young man from Kirinyaga County, has shared his painful experience after joining the Russian military and fighting in the ongoing Russia-Ukraine war. According to his account, he trave...

item.title: Hull City secure Premier League promotion with late McBurnie goal in Championship playoff final
item.description: Hull City have secured a dramatic return to the English Premier League after edging Middlesbrough 1-0 in the Championship playoff final at Wembley Stadium, with Oli McBurnie scoring a stoppage-time wi...

item.title: Sanjia Steel officials question legality of government raid on Misamis Oriental plant
item.description: Officials of Philippine Sanjia Steel Corp. criticised the recent raid on their steel manufacturing facility in Tagoloan, Misamis Oriental, calling the operation an act of harassment rather than a legi...

item.title: Australian government and international leaders condemn Ben-Gvir over treatment of Gaza flotilla activists
item.description: Israel’s ambassador to Australia, Hillel Newman, has publicly distanced the Israeli government from far-right security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after footage emerged showing detained Gaza flotilla act...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Port Plans Twelfth Berth to Manage Growing Cargo Traffic
item.description: Tanzania's Dar es Salaam port is preparing to construct its twelfth berth in order to deal with the increasing amounts of cargo passing through the facility. This development comes as the port continu...

item.title: ABS-CBN Highlights Throwback ‘Minute To Win It’ Episode Featuring Luis Manzano and Jessy Mendiola
item.description: ABS-CBN published a throwback entertainment feature revisiting a past episode of the popular game show “Minute To Win It” that featured television personalities Luis Manzano and Jessy Mendiola during ...

item.title: SpaceX Successfully Conducts Starship V3 Flight 12 Test with Indian Ocean Splashdown
item.description: SpaceX achieved a significant milestone on May 22, 2026, with the successful launch of its next-generation Starship V3 vehicle on Flight 12 from Starbase, Texas. This marked the first test flight of t...

item.title: WHO Raises Ebola Risk Level in DR Congo as Bundibugyo Outbreak Expands
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has raised the public health risk from the ongoing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo) from “high” to “very high” at the national level. W...

item.title: Investigation underway after major coal mine gas explosion in China’s Shanxi province kills dozens
item.description: Chinese authorities have launched a full investigation into a deadly gas explosion at a coal mine in Shanxi province, an incident now regarded as the country’s most severe mining disaster since 2009. ...

item.title: Supreme Court Conservatives Decline to Join Clarence Thomas in Challenging Protections for Intellectually Disabled Death Row Inmates
item.description: A recent dissent by Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas in the Alabama death penalty case Hamm v. Smith revealed divisions within the court’s conservative majority regarding constitutional protectio...

item.title: Meat consumption, masculinity myths, and their impact on climate goals
item.description: A recent article explores the link between traditional ideas of masculinity and high meat consumption among Australian men, and how this affects efforts to tackle the climate crisis. Research shows me...

item.title: Trump signals uncertainty over potential renewed US military action in Iran ahead of imminent decision
item.description: Donald Trump has said he is “50/50” on whether the United States will resume military strikes against Iran, indicating that a final decision could be made within days. Speaking in comments reported by...

item.title: Australians released from Israeli detention after Gaza flotilla interception claim mistreatment
item.description: Eleven Australians were among more than 400 international activists detained by Israeli forces after their Gaza-bound flotilla was intercepted in international waters. The group, part of the Global Su...

item.title: Fireballs beat Flames 58–28 to continue Telkom Netball League title defence
item.description: The Gauteng Golden Fireballs delivered a powerful response in the Telkom Netball League Power Week 2, crushing the North West Flames 58–28 at Ellis Park Arena in Johannesburg on Saturday night. The re...

item.title: Authorities confirm ongoing pursuit of Belle Gibson’s $410,000 court penalty
item.description: Consumer Affairs Victoria has confirmed that the $410,000 court penalty imposed on disgraced wellness influencer Belle Gibson has not been written off and continues to be actively pursued, almost a de...

item.title: Ferdinand Omanyala wins 100m Diamond League race in Xiamen with 9.94 seconds
item.description: Kenya’s sprint star Ferdinand Omanyala delivered a strong performance at the 2026 Xiamen Diamond League meeting in China, winning the men’s 100m race in 9.94 seconds. The African record holder showed ...

item.title: JMFyang shares lessons from veteran co-stars and acting challenges in “Love Is Never Gone”
item.description: The article highlights the experiences of JMFyang while working on the television project “Love Is Never Gone.” It focuses on how the pair learned valuable acting lessons from their more experienced c...

item.title: Trump considers Iran proposal as U.S. and mediators move toward potential framework to end war
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump held meetings with Gulf and other regional leaders as his administration evaluated a new Iranian proposal aimed at ending the ongoing conflict. According to officials, disc...

item.title: PCCB arrests fugitive suspect linked to Sh1.6bn copper fraud involving Chinese investors
item.description: The Prevention and Combating of Corruption Bureau (PCCB) in Tanzania has confirmed the arrest and repatriation of a man accused of being involved in a Sh1.6 billion copper fraud case targeting Chinese...
